full_text:
Ren Hao 任昊
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ren Hao (任昊)was born in Bochang county, Le’an commandery. Minister of Ceremonies around 254 supporting Cao Fang’s deposal. Ren Hao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Ren Hao was from Bochang county, Le’an commandery. He was Minister of Ceremonies by the year 254. During his tenure, he was one of many ministers to petition the removal of Cao Fang, claiming dissolute behavior. Not much else is known about Ren Hao, other than that his son, Ren Kai, would become a prominent Jin politician.
